cards.name: 9 of Wands
cards.interpretation: last stand, persistence, grit, resilience, perseverance, close to success, fatigue

cards.name: Queen of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, giving too much, overly-sensitive, needy, fragile, dependence, martyrdom

cards.name: 8 of Cups
cards.interpretation: abandonment, walking away, letting go, searching for truth, leaving behind
